title: Looking for Category Manager at Xpressbees

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Xpressbees
jsonLd.description:
Xpressbees invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Xpressbees:
Xpressbees is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
